sentences.arabic: نَظَّمَتِ الْمَدْرَسَةُ يَوْمًا لِلرِّيَاضَةِ فِي الْهَوَاءِ الطَّلْقِ.
sentences.translation: Škola je organizovala dan sporta na otvorenom.
sentences.translationEn: The school organized a sports day in the open air.

sentences.arabic: تَنَافَسَ الطُّلَّابُ فِي الْجَرْيِ وَالْقَفْزِ وَرَمْيِ الْكُرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su se takmičili u trčanju, skakanju i bacanju lopte.
sentences.translationEn: Students competed in running, jumping, and ball throwing.

sentences.arabic: شَجَّعَ الْآبَاءُ أَبْنَاءَهُمْ مِنَ الْمَدْرَجَاتِ بِحَمَاسٍ.
sentences.translation: Roditelji su oduševljeno navijali za svoju djecu sa tribina.
sentences.translationEn: Parents cheered for their children from the stands enthusiastically.

sentences.arabic: حَصَلَ كُلُّ طَالِبٍ عَلَى وِجْبَةٍ فِي نِهَايَةِ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki učenik je dobio obrok na kraju dana.
sentences.translationEn: Every student received a meal at the end of the day.
